title: Legislators
exposure_rationale: Legislators engage in high-level decision-making and interpersonal communication, which are not easily automated by AI. While AI may assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core responsibilities of planning and directing require human judgment and interaction, limiting overall exposure.

title: Senior government managers and officials
education_req: A university degree or college diploma is usually required.
A graduate degree in a related field may be required.
Several years of managerial experience in the public or private sector are required.
exposure_rationale: Senior government managers and officials engage in a mix of strategic planning, decision-making, and interpersonal communication, which requires human judgment and leadership skills. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core responsibilities of this role involve complex human interactions and nuanced decision-making that AI cannot fully replicate.

title: Senior managers - financial, communications and other business services
education_req: A university degree in business administration, commerce, computer science or other discipline related to the service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in financial, communications or other business services are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or service is possible through specific university training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in financial, communications, and other business services engage in a mix of strategic decision-making and interpersonal interactions, which are not easily automated. While AI can assist with data analysis and reporting, the core responsibilities of leadership, vision, and human judgment remain essential, resulting in moderate exposure to AI.

title: Senior managers - health, education, social and community services and membership organizations
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, hospital administration, finance or other discipline related to the service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in a related institution or organization are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or service is possible through specific university or college training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in health, education, and social services primarily engage in strategic decision-making, leadership, and interpersonal communication, which are less susceptible to automation. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core responsibilities of managing teams and making complex decisions still require human judgment and presence.

title: Senior managers - trade, broadcasting and other services
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, finance or other discipline related to the service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in trade, broadcasting or other service are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or service is possible through specific university or college training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in trade, broadcasting, and other services engage in a mix of strategic decision-making and interpersonal interactions, which are less susceptible to full automation. While AI can assist with data analysis and operational efficiencies, the core responsibilities of leadership, vision, and human judgment remain essential, limiting the overall exposure to AI.

title: Senior managers - construction, transportation, production and utilities
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in engineering, business administration, commerce or other discipline related to the company's product is usually required.
Several years of experience as a middle manager in goods production, utilities, transportation or construction are usually required.
Specialization in a particular functional area or product is possible through specific university or college training in that area or through previous experience.
exposure_rationale: Senior managers in construction, transportation, production, and utilities primarily engage in strategic planning and decision-making, which requires human judgment and interpersonal skills. While AI can assist with data analysis and operational efficiencies, the core responsibilities of leadership and management still necessitate a significant human presence and nuanced understanding of complex, dynamic environments.

title: Financial managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in business administration, economics, commerce or a related field is required.
A master's degree in business administration (concentration in finance), or another master's level management program may be required.
Several years of experience in accounting, auditing, budgeting, financial planning and analysis or other financial activities are required.
exposure_rationale: Financial managers engage in predominantly knowledge work, involving planning and decision-making that requires human judgment and strategic thinking. While AI can assist with data analysis and financial modeling, the role still heavily relies on interpersonal skills and complex decision-making that AI cannot fully replicate.

title: Human resources managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in a field related to personnel management, such as business administration, industrial relations, commerce or psychology or completion of a professional development program in personnel administration is required.
Several years of experience as a personnel officer or human resource specialist are required.
Some employers may require human resources managers to hold a Certified Human Resources Professional (CHRP) designation.
exposure_rationale: Human resources managers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, which includes strategic planning and employee relations. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core functions of managing human resources still require significant human judgment and relationship-building, limiting overall exposure.

title: Purchasing managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce or economics is usually required.

Purchasing managers responsible for units purchasing specialized materials or business services may require a related degree or diploma. For example, a bachelor's degree or college diploma in engineering may be required for purchasing managers responsible for purchasing industrial products.
The designation Supply Chain Management Professional (SCMP) or registration in the educational program of the Supply Chain Management Association may be required.
exposure_rationale: Purchasing managers engage in a mix of strategic decision-making and interpersonal communication, which involves both knowledge work and human judgment. While AI can assist in data analysis and procurement processes, the role still requires significant human oversight and relationship management, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Other administrative services managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration or a related administrative services field is usually required.
Several years of experience at a professional level in business administration, finance or administrative services are usually required.

An Associate of the Institute of the Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (ACIS), Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Secretaries and Administrators (FCIS) or a Professional Administrator (P Adm) designation may be required for some occupations in this group.
exposure_rationale: Other administrative services managers engage in a mix of management tasks that require both knowledge work and interpersonal skills. While AI can assist with data analysis and organizational tasks, the role still heavily relies on human judgment, decision-making, and relationship management, which limits its exposure to AI.

title: Insurance, real estate and financial brokerage managers
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, economics or other related field is usually required.
Several years of experience within the appropriate industry are usually required.
Licensure appropriate to the service sold, such as real estate, mortgage, securities or insurance, may be required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of management tasks that require human judgment, interpersonal skills, and strategic decision-making, which are not easily automated. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core responsibilities of planning and directing operations still rely heavily on human expertise and interaction.

title: Banking, credit and other investment managers
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce, economics or a related field is usually required.
A master's degree in business administration, finance or management science may be required for the management of large commercial loans.
A recognized financial designation may be required (CFA, CFP, CIM or others).
exposure_rationale: Banking, credit, and investment managers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves planning, organizing, and evaluating financial strategies. While AI can enhance productivity through data analysis and decision support, the role still requires significant human judgment and interpersonal skills, particularly in client relations and strategic decision-making.

title: Advertising, marketing and public relations managers
education_req: Advertising and public relations managers

A university degree or college diploma in communications, public relations, marketing, journalism or in a related field and several years of experience in an advertising, public relations or communications officer position or in a related occupation are required.
Marketing managers
exposure_rationale: Advertising, marketing, and public relations managers engage in a mix of strategic planning and creative tasks that require human judgment and interpersonal skills. While AI can assist in data analysis, content generation, and campaign optimization, the core aspects of relationship management and creative direction still rely heavily on human insight and creativity.

title: Other business services managers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in a field related to the business service provided is usually required.
Several years of experience in a field related to the business service provided are usually required.
Licences, certificates or registration may be required for some business services managers. For example, accounting firm managers usually require accounting certification.
exposure_rationale: Other business services managers engage in a mix of strategic planning and interpersonal management, which requires human judgment and relationship-building. While AI can assist with data analysis and decision-making processes, the core responsibilities of managing teams and organizations still necessitate a human presence and nuanced understanding of complex situations.

title: Telecommunication carriers managers
education_req: A university degree in science, electrical engineering or a related field is usually required.
Several years of experience in a related technical profession, including supervisory experience, are usually required.
exposure_rationale: Telecommunication carriers managers engage in a mix of strategic planning and management tasks that require human judgment and interpersonal skills. While AI can assist with data analysis and operational efficiencies, the core responsibilities of leadership, decision-making, and relationship management still necessitate a human presence, resulting in moderate exposure to AI.

title: Financial auditors and accountants
education_req: Chartered professional accountants, chartered accountants (CPA, CA) require a university degree and completion of a professional training program approved by a provincial Institute of Chartered Accountants and, depending on the province, either two years or 30 months of on-the-job training and membership in a provincial Institute of Chartered Accountants upon successful completion of the Uniform Evaluation (UFE).

Chartered professional accountants, certified general accountants (CPA, CGA) and chartered professional accountants, certified management accountants (CPA, CMA) require a university degree and completion of an approved training program and several years of on-the-job training and certification with a regulatory body is required in all provinces and territories.

Auditors require education, training and recognition as indicated for chartered professional accountants, chartered accountants (CPA, CA), chartered professional accountants, certified general accountants (CPA, CGA) or chartered professional accountants, certified management accountants (CPA, CMA) and some experience as an accountant.
exposure_rationale: Financial auditors and accountants primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing data, preparing reports, and ensuring compliance with regulations. While AI can assist with data processing and routine tasks, the need for human judgment, ethical considerations, and client interactions means that a significant portion of the job still requires human expertise and presence.

title: Financial and investment analysts
education_req: A bachelor's degree in commerce, business administration, accounting, finance or economics and on-the-job training and industry courses and programs are usually required.
A master's degree in business administration (MBA) (concentration in finance) or in finance may be required.
The Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) designation, available through a program conducted by the CFA Institute or an other recognized financial designations (CFP, CIM or others), is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Financial and investment analysts primarily engage in knowledge work that involves data analysis, forecasting, and decision-making, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and expertise are essential, the increasing capabilities of AI in processing financial data and generating insights indicate a high potential for restructuring in this occupation.

title: Financial advisors
education_req: A bachelor's degree in business administration, commerce, economics or a related field is usually required.
The designation Certified Financial Planner, awarded by the Financial Planners Standards Council of Canada, may be required.
To sell regulated financial products and investments, such as annuities, RRSPs and life insurance, a licence is required from the appropriate governing body.
exposure_rationale: Financial advisors primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing financial data, providing personalized advice, and building client relationships. While AI can assist with data analysis and automate some routine tasks, the role still heavily relies on human judgment, interpersonal skills, and trust-building, which limits its overall exposure to AI.

title: Securities agents, investment dealers and brokers
education_req: A bachelor's or master's degree in economics, business or other discipline is usually required.
A recognized financial designation may be required (CFA, CFP, CIM or others).

Securities sales representatives and brokers require completion of industry investment and sales training programs and completion of licensing courses such as the Canadian Securities Course and the Conduct and Practices Handbook Course offered by the Canadian Securities Institute, or acceptable alternatives such as completion of one or more levels of the CFA Program, offered by CFA Institute.
exposure_rationale: Securities agents, investment dealers, and brokers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing financial data, advising clients, and making investment decisions. While AI can assist with data analysis and automate some trading processes, the need for human judgment, relationship management, and personalized advice keeps the exposure to AI at a high but not maximum level.

title: Other financial officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in business administration, commerce, economics or a related field is usually required.

Various training programs and courses are offered by financial institutes and organizations, such as the Canadian Securities Institute, Institute of Canadian Bankers, CFA Institute, Investment Funds Institute and Trust Companies Institute of Canada, and may be required by employers.
A recognized financial designation may be required (CFA, CIM or others).
exposure_rationale: Other financial officers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, which means that while AI can assist with data analysis and reporting, significant aspects of the job still require human judgment and interaction. The occupation's reliance on both digital tools and human skills places it in the moderate exposure category.

title: Human resources professionals
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in human resources management or a related field, such as business administration, industrial relations, commerce or psychology or completion of a professional development program in human resources administration is required.
Some employers may require human resources professionals to hold a Certified Human Resources Professional (CHRP) designation.
exposure_rationale: Human resources professionals engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, such as recruitment, employee relations, and organizational development. While AI can assist with data analysis and administrative tasks, the core functions still require human judgment and relationship-building, leading to moderate exposure to AI.

title: Professional occupations in business management consulting
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce or a related discipline is usually required.
A graduate degree in business administration may be required.
Some establishments may require management consultants to be certified by a provincial management consulting association.
exposure_rationale: Business management consulting involves a significant amount of knowledge work, including analysis, strategy development, and communication, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and interpersonal skills are crucial for client interactions and decision-making, AI can assist in data analysis and process optimization, leading to increased productivity.

title: Professional occupations in advertising, marketing and public relations
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business marketing, public relations, communications, journalism, museology or a discipline related to a particular subject matter is usually required.
Practitioners in public relations may require an APR (Accredited in Public Relations) designation.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of knowledge work, including strategy development, creative processes, and client interactions, which are increasingly supported by AI tools. While AI can enhance productivity and assist with data analysis and campaign optimization, the need for human judgment and creativity in advertising and marketing mitigates full automation.

title: Supervisors, general office and administrative support workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Completion of college courses related to area supervised is usually required.
Experience in the occupation supervised is usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of administrative tasks and supervisory responsibilities, which can be supported by AI tools for efficiency and productivity. However, the need for human judgment, interpersonal skills, and oversight in managing teams and operations limits the extent of AI's impact on core job functions.

title: Supervisors, finance and insurance office workers
education_req: Completion of a college program or courses in bookkeeping, accounting or a related subject is required.
Experience in the clerical occupation supervised is required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of supervisory and administrative tasks that can benefit from AI tools, particularly in data analysis and process optimization. While human judgment and interpersonal skills are essential, the increasing use of AI in finance and administration suggests a significant potential for productivity gains and restructuring in the role.

title: Supervisors, library, correspondence and related information workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Completion of college courses related to area supervised may be required.
Experience in the clerical occupation supervised is usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of supervisory and administrative tasks that may benefit from AI tools for data management and communication. However, the need for human judgment, interpersonal skills, and oversight in managing teams and processes limits the extent of AI's impact, resulting in moderate exposure.

title: Supervisors, supply chain, tracking and scheduling coordination occupations
education_req: Completion of a post-secondary education program of two to three years in business, supply chain, production or manufacturing management and related is usually required.
Several years of experience in the occupation supervised are usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal skills, particularly in coordinating and supervising supply chain activities. While AI can assist with data analysis and scheduling tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and interaction, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Executive assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A bachelor's degree in public administration, political science or a related discipline is usually required.
Experience in a related administrative occupation is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Executive assistants primarily engage in knowledge work that involves managing schedules, communications, and administrative tasks, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While some aspects of the role require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the increasing capabilities of AI in automating routine tasks suggest a high potential for productivity gains and restructuring in this occupation.

title: Human resources and recruitment officers
education_req: A college diploma in a field related to personnel management such as business administration, industrial relations, commerce or completion of a professional development program in personnel administration is usually required.
Certification as a Certified Human Resources Professional (CHRP) may be required.
Some experience in a clerical or administrative position related to personnel administration may be required.
exposure_rationale: Human resources and recruitment officers engage in a mix of interpersonal and knowledge work, including tasks like interviewing and relationship management that require human judgment. While AI can assist with data analysis and candidate screening, the core functions still rely heavily on human interaction and decision-making.

title: Procurement and purchasing agents and officers
education_req: Procurement and purchasing agents and officers usually require a bachelor's degree or college diploma in business administration, commerce or economics.

Procurement and purchasing agents and officers purchasing specialized materials or business services may require a related university degree or college diploma. For example, a bachelor's degree or college diploma in engineering may be required for purchasers of industrial products.
A certificate in purchasing from the Purchasing Management Association of Canada (PMAC) may be required.
exposure_rationale: Procurement and purchasing agents and officers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as negotiating contracts and managing supplier relationships. While AI can assist with data analysis and procurement processes, the role still requires significant human judgment and interaction, leading to a moderate exposure to AI.

title: Conference and event planners
education_req: A university degree or college diploma in business, tourism or hospitality administration is usually required.
Several years of experience in hospitality or tourism administration or in public relations are usually required and may substitute for formal education requirements.
Certification relating to special events, meetings or conference management may be required.
exposure_rationale: Conference and event planners engage in a mix of interpersonal and organizational tasks that require human judgment, creativity, and real-time interaction with clients and vendors. While AI can assist with scheduling and logistics, the core aspects of planning and executing events rely heavily on human presence and decision-making.

title: Employment insurance and revenue officers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma is usually required.
Several years of related administrative or regulatory experience may be required.
Completion of specialized government training is required.
exposure_rationale: Employment insurance and revenue officers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, primarily involving data analysis and communication. While AI can assist with data processing and administrative tasks, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Court reporters, medical transcriptionists and related occupations
education_req: Court reporters require completion of secondary school.
Completion of a college or other program in court reporting is usually required and the Chartered Shorthand Reporter (CSR) certificate may be required for court reporters.
Medical transcriptionists require completion of secondary school.
exposure_rationale: Court reporters and medical transcriptionists primarily engage in knowledge work that involves processing and transcribing information, which can be significantly enhanced by AI technologies. While human judgment and accuracy are still crucial in these roles, the increasing capabilities of AI in transcription and reporting suggest a high potential for productivity gains and restructuring in the field.

title: Health information management occupations
education_req: Health information management technicians and related workers require completion of a recognized two-year college diploma program in health record technology or health information management.

Health information management technicians and related workers are eligible to write the Canadian Health Information Management Association national certification examination which may be required by employers.
exposure_rationale: Health information management occupations involve a mix of knowledge work and administrative tasks, which can be supported by AI tools for data processing and management. However, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, particularly in handling sensitive health information and ensuring compliance with regulations, limiting the overall exposure to AI.

title: Records management technicians
education_req: Records management technicians usually require completion of a two- to three-year college program in information or records management technology.
Two to three years' experience in a records management environment may be required.
exposure_rationale: Records management technicians engage in a mix of knowledge work and clerical tasks, which can be supported by AI tools for data organization and retrieval. However, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, particularly in managing sensitive information and ensuring compliance with regulations, limiting the overall exposure to AI.

title: Statistical officers and related research support occupations
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A college diploma or undergraduate degree in a social science, commerce, statistics or a related field is usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of knowledge work and some administrative tasks, which can be supported by AI tools for data analysis and reporting. However, the need for human judgment and interpersonal skills in interpreting data and communicating findings limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Accounting technicians and bookkeepers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.

Completion of a college program in accounting, bookkeeping or a related field or completion of two years (first level) of a recognized professional accounting program (e.g., Chartered Accounting, Certified General Accounting) or courses in accounting or bookkeeping combined with several years of experience as a financial or accounting clerk are required.
exposure_rationale: Accounting technicians and bookkeepers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves data processing and financial analysis, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While some tasks require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the increasing automation of routine accounting tasks suggests a high level of AI exposure.

title: Insurance adjusters and claims examiners
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A bachelor's degree, college diploma or some post-secondary education or several years of experience as a clerk in the claims department or other general insurance experience is required.
Several years of on-the-job training and completion of insurance industry courses and training programs are required.
exposure_rationale: Insurance adjusters and claims examiners engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal communication, which means that while AI can assist with data analysis and processing claims, significant aspects of the job still require human judgment and interaction. The occupation is moderately exposed to AI, as advancements can enhance productivity but won't fully automate the role.

title: Insurance underwriters
education_req: Completion of secondary school and some general insurance experience or a bachelor's degree, college diploma or some post-secondary education is required.
Several years of on-the-job training and completion of insurance industry underwriting courses and training programs are required.
exposure_rationale: Insurance underwriters engage in a mix of knowledge work and decision-making that involves analyzing data and assessing risk, which can be supported by AI tools. While AI can assist in data processing and risk assessment, the role still requires human judgment and interpersonal skills, particularly in client interactions and complex decision-making.

title: Assessors, business valuators and appraisers
education_req: Assessors require a college diploma in municipal assessment and accreditation with the municipal assessment association of the province.

Business valuators usually require a bachelor's degree or college diploma in accounting, business or commerce and accreditation with the Canadian Institute of Chartered Business Valuators based on successful completion of its business and security valuation program.
Appraisers require a college diploma or vocational training in the field of appraisal or several years of experience in a position related to the field of appraisal.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal skills, as assessors and appraisers must analyze data and provide valuations while also interacting with clients and stakeholders. While AI can assist in data analysis and streamline some processes, the need for human judgment and relationship management in valuations limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Administrative officers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A university degree or college diploma in business or public administration may be required.
Experience in a senior clerical or executive secretarial position related to office administration is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Administrative officers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves organizing, analyzing, and managing information, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While some tasks may still require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the increasing use of AI in administrative functions suggests a high potential for productivity gains and restructuring in this occupation.

title: Property administrators
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required in all provinces and territories except for British Columbia.
A language proficiency index is required in British Columbia.
Property administrators must be a minimum of nineteen years of age in British Columbia.
exposure_rationale: Property administrators engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, such as managing property operations and tenant relations. While AI can assist with data management and administrative tasks, the role still requires significant human judgment and interaction, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Payroll administrators
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of college or other courses in accounting, bookkeeping or payroll administration or experience in payroll administration is usually required.
Payroll association certification may be required.
exposure_rationale: Payroll administrators primarily engage in knowledge work that involves processing financial information and managing payroll systems, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While some tasks may still require human judgment and oversight, the increasing automation of payroll processes suggests a significant potential for AI to reshape this occupation.

title: Administrative assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a one- or two-year college or other program for administrative assistants or secretaries or previous clerical experience is required.
exposure_rationale: Administrative assistants primarily engage in knowledge work that involves organizing, managing information, and supporting business operations, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While some tasks may still require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the increasing use of AI for scheduling, data management, and communication suggests a significant potential for productivity gains and restructuring in this occupation.

title: Legal administrative assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a one- or two-year college or other program for secretaries or legal secretaries is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Legal administrative assistants perform a mix of clerical and administrative tasks that involve both knowledge work and interpersonal skills. While AI can assist with document management and scheduling, many core responsibilities still require human judgment and interaction, leading to moderate exposure to AI advancements.

title: Medical administrative assistants
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a one- or two-year college program or other specialized courses for secretaries or medical secretaries is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Medical administrative assistants perform a mix of clerical and administrative tasks that involve both knowledge work and interpersonal interactions. While AI can assist with scheduling, data entry, and some administrative functions, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, particularly in a healthcare setting where empathy and communication are crucial.

title: Customs, ship and other brokers
education_req: Completion of secondary school and some post-secondary education in commerce or a related field is required
Customs brokers require several years of on-the-job training and completion of a customs brokers training program through the International Federation of Customs Brokers Association.
A customs broker licence, issued by the Canada Border Services Agency, is required for an individual or company to operate a customs brokerage business.
exposure_rationale: The occupation of customs, ship, and other brokers involves a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal skills, particularly in navigating regulations and client relationships. While AI can assist with data processing and compliance checks, the need for human judgment and interaction in complex scenarios limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Production and transportation logistics coordinators
education_req: Completion of a post-secondary education program of less than two years in Business or Supply Chain Management or extensive experience as a dispatcher, production clerk or scheduling clerk is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Production and transportation logistics coordinators engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, which means AI can assist with data analysis and optimization but cannot fully automate the role. The need for human judgment and coordination in logistics, especially in unpredictable environments, limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: General office support workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of secondary school or college business or commercial courses is usually required.
exposure_rationale: General office support workers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves tasks such as data entry, scheduling, and communication, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While some aspects of the job require human judgment and interpersonal skills, the increasing automation of administrative tasks suggests a significant potential for AI to reshape this occupation.

title: Receptionists
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
On-the-job training may be provided.
exposure_rationale: Receptionists perform a mix of administrative tasks that involve both interpersonal communication and some knowledge work. While AI can assist with scheduling and basic inquiries, the role still requires human presence and judgment, particularly in managing client interactions and office dynamics.

title: Personnel clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of college or other courses in personnel administration may be required.
Some clerical experience may be required.
exposure_rationale: Personnel clerks primarily engage in administrative and clerical tasks, which involve a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal communication. While AI can assist with data processing and scheduling, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, limiting its overall exposure to AI advancements.

title: Court clerks and related court services occupations
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
On-the-job training is provided for court officers, court clerks, and court liaison officers.
Special Constable Certification may be required for court officers and court liaison officers.
exposure_rationale: Court clerks engage in a mix of administrative tasks that involve both knowledge work and interpersonal interactions. While AI can assist with information processing and administrative duties, many aspects of the job still require human judgment and presence, particularly in legal contexts where nuanced understanding and communication are crucial.

title: Survey interviewers and statistical clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school may be required.
Experience in the operation of a computer may be required.
On-the-job training is usually provided.
exposure_rationale: Survey interviewers and statistical clerks engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal communication, which means that while AI can assist with data processing and analysis, the role still requires human judgment and interaction. The occupation's reliance on human skills for conducting interviews and interpreting nuanced data limits its exposure to full automation.

title: Data entry clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school may be required.
College or other courses in data entry may be required.
exposure_rationale: Data entry clerks primarily engage in routine information processing tasks that are fully digital and can be easily automated by AI technologies. As AI continues to advance, it can already perform most of the tasks associated with this occupation, leading to a significant reduction in the need for human workers in this role.

title: Desktop publishing operators and related occupations
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Completion of a college program in graphic arts, or other training in typography, computer typesetting or desktop publishing, is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Desktop publishing operators primarily engage in knowledge work that involves creating and managing digital content. While there is a degree of human judgment and creativity involved, AI tools can significantly enhance productivity in tasks such as layout design and content generation, indicating a high level of exposure to AI advancements.

title: Accounting and related clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of college or other courses certified by the Certified General Accountants Association of Canada, Canadian Securities Institute or Canadian Bookkeepers Association may be required.
Some accounting clerks must be bondable.
exposure_rationale: Accounting and related clerks primarily engage in knowledge work that involves data processing and analysis, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and oversight are still essential in many accounting tasks, the increasing capabilities of AI in automating routine data entry and analysis suggest a high level of exposure to AI-driven changes.

title: Banking, insurance and other financial clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A business college diploma may be required.
On-the-job training and short-term training courses or programs specific to the financial establishment are usually required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a significant amount of knowledge work, particularly in processing financial information and administrative tasks, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and interpersonal skills are still important, AI can automate many routine tasks, leading to increased productivity and potential restructuring of roles.

title: Collection clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
A business college diploma may be required.
A period of on-the-job training is often provided for collection clerks and collection officers.
exposure_rationale: Collection clerks engage in a mix of administrative and clerical tasks that involve both knowledge work and interpersonal communication. While AI can assist with data processing and routine tasks, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Library assistants and clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Library assistants and clerks perform a mix of clerical and administrative tasks that involve both knowledge work and interpersonal interactions. While AI can assist with information processing and organization, many core tasks still require human presence and judgment, limiting the overall exposure to AI.

title: Correspondence, publication and regulatory clerks
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Additional courses or a diploma in writing, journalism or a related field may be required.
Previous clerical or administrative experience may be required.
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of clerical and administrative tasks that can be partially automated by AI, particularly in information processing and document management. However, the need for human judgment, communication, and interpersonal skills in regulatory and publication contexts limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Shippers and receivers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Experience in a related clerical occupation or as a warehouse worker may be required.
A forklift certificate may be required.
exposure_rationale: Shippers and receivers primarily engage in clerical and administrative tasks that involve some level of knowledge work, but they also require physical presence and interaction with goods. While AI can assist with data management and logistics optimization, the core tasks still necessitate human oversight and physical handling, limiting overall exposure to automation.

title: Storekeepers and partspersons
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a three-year apprenticeship program or completion of specialized training in high school and a one-year college program for partspersons may be required.
Trade certification for partspersons is available, but voluntary, in all provinces and territories.
exposure_rationale: Storekeepers and partspersons engage in a mix of clerical and administrative tasks that can be supported by AI, particularly in data management and inventory tracking. However, the role still requires human judgment and interpersonal skills, especially in customer service and decision-making, which limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Production logistics workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Production logistics workers engage in a mix of administrative tasks and decision-making that can benefit from AI tools, particularly in data analysis and process optimization. However, the role still requires human judgment and interpersonal skills, limiting the extent to which AI can fully automate the job.

title: Purchasing and inventory control workers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Courses in purchasing management may be required for purchasing control workers.
Courses in production and inventory management and ability to operate a computerized inventory system may be required for inventory control workers.
exposure_rationale: Purchasing and inventory control workers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, which means AI can assist with data analysis, inventory tracking, and procurement processes. However, the role still requires human judgment and decision-making, particularly in negotiations and supplier relationships, limiting the overall exposure to AI.

title: Dispatchers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Police and emergency dispatchers and other radio operators usually require provincial radio operator's certificates.
Police and emergency dispatchers are required to complete formal on-the-job training. Other dispatchers usually undergo some informal on-the-job training.
exposure_rationale: Dispatchers primarily engage in coordinating and managing logistics, which involves a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal communication. While AI can assist with scheduling and data analysis, the role still requires human judgment and real-time decision-making, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Transportation route and crew schedulers
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Several years of experience in an appropriate transportation sector are usually required.
On-the-job training may be provided.
exposure_rationale: Transportation route and crew schedulers involve a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal communication, as they need to coordinate schedules and manage logistics. While AI can assist with data analysis and optimization of routes, the role still requires human judgment and interaction, leading to a moderate level of exposure to AI advancements.

title: Engineering managers
exposure_rationale: Engineering managers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves overseeing projects, coordinating teams, and making strategic decisions. While AI can assist with data analysis and project management tools, the role still requires significant human judgment, interpersonal skills, and leadership, which limits its exposure to AI automation.

title: Architecture and science managers
education_req: Architecture managers require a degree in architecture, registration as a professional architect and several years of experience as an architect.
Landscape architecture managers require a degree in landscape architecture, licensing as a professional landscape architect and several years of experience as a landscape architect.
Science and other managers in this unit group require a master's or doctoral degree in a scientific discipline and several years of experience in a related scientific discipline.
exposure_rationale: Architecture and science managers engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal tasks, requiring both technical expertise and human judgment. While AI can assist in data analysis and project management, the need for creative problem-solving and leadership in complex projects limits the extent of automation in this occupation.

title: Computer and information systems managers
education_req: A bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, business administration, commerce or engineering is usually required.
Several years of experience in systems analysis, data administration, software engineering, network design or computer programming, including supervisory experience, are required.
exposure_rationale: Computer and information systems managers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves overseeing IT projects, managing teams, and making strategic decisions. While AI can assist in data analysis and project management, the role still requires significant human judgment, leadership, and interpersonal skills, which limits its exposure to AI automation.

title: Physicists and astronomers
exposure_rationale: Physicists and astronomers engage in predominantly knowledge-based work that involves analysis, research, and data interpretation, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While their work requires human judgment and creativity, AI can assist in data processing and simulations, making workers more productive and potentially reshaping the field.

title: Chemists
education_req: A bachelor's degree in chemistry, biochemistry or a related discipline is required.
A master's or doctoral degree is usually required for employment as a research chemist.
Licensing by a provincial association of chemists is required in Quebec and available but voluntary, in Nova Scotia, Ontario, Saskatchewan, Alberta and British Columbia.
exposure_rationale: Chemists engage in a mix of laboratory work and data analysis, which involves both physical presence and knowledge work. While AI can assist in data processing and analysis, the hands-on nature of experiments and the need for human judgment in interpreting results limit the overall exposure to AI.

title: Geoscientists and oceanographers
education_req: Geoscientists require a university degree in geology, geochemistry, geophysics or a related discipline.
A master's or doctoral degree in geophysics, physics, mathematics or engineering may be required for employment as a geophysicist.

Registration with a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers, geologists, geophysicists or geoscientists is usually required for employment and is mandatory to practice in all provinces and territories except Prince Edward Island and the Yukon.
exposure_rationale: Geoscientists and oceanographers engage in a mix of knowledge work and fieldwork, requiring both analytical skills and real-world data collection. While AI can assist with data analysis and modeling, the need for human judgment and physical presence in various environments limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Meteorologists and climatologists
education_req: A bachelor's or master's degree in meteorology, atmospheric sciences or in a related field is required.
A doctoral degree is usually required for employment as a research scientist in meteorology.
Formal training is provided by Environment Canada for operational meteorologists employed by the federal government.
exposure_rationale: Meteorologists and climatologists engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application, utilizing data analysis and modeling to predict weather patterns and climate changes. While AI can assist in data processing and predictive modeling, the occupation still requires human judgment and interpretation, particularly in communicating complex scientific information and adapting to real-world scenarios.

title: Other professional occupations in physical sciences
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves a mix of knowledge work and practical applications in physical sciences, which may include tasks that require human judgment and presence. While AI can assist with data analysis and simulations, many core tasks still necessitate human expertise and interaction, leading to a moderate exposure to AI.

title: Biologists and related scientists
education_req: A bachelor's degree in biology or in a related discipline is required for biologists.
A master's or doctoral degree in biology or a related discipline is required for employment as a research scientist in biology.
Post-doctoral research experience is usually required before employment in academic departments or research institutions.
exposure_rationale: Biologists and related scientists engage in a mix of laboratory work, field studies, and data analysis, which involves both physical presence and knowledge work. While AI can assist with data processing and analysis, many core tasks still require human judgment, creativity, and hands-on experimentation, leading to moderate exposure to AI.

title: Forestry professionals
exposure_rationale: Forestry professionals primarily engage in fieldwork that requires physical presence and hands-on skills, such as managing forests and conducting environmental assessments. While AI may assist with data analysis and modeling, the core tasks of this occupation are not easily automated and still rely heavily on human judgment and interaction with the natural environment.

title: Agricultural representatives, consultants and specialists
education_req: A bachelor's or master's degree in agriculture or in a related science is required.
Membership or eligibility for membership in a provincial institute of agrology is usually required.
In Quebec, membership in the Ordre professionnel des agronomes is mandatory.
exposure_rationale: Agricultural representatives, consultants, and specialists engage in a mix of knowledge work and field-based activities, requiring both technical expertise and real-world presence. While AI can assist with data analysis and decision-making processes, the job's reliance on human judgment, interpersonal relationships, and physical presence in agricultural settings limits its overall exposure to AI.

title: Public and environmental health and safety professionals
education_req: A bachelor's degree in a discipline such as food science, environmental studies, chemistry or health and safety is usually required.
Public health inspectors employed outside Quebec require certification with the Canadian Institute of Public Health Inspectors.
Environmental health and safety professionals may require certification with the Board of Canadian Registered Safety Professionals (BCRSP).
exposure_rationale: Public and environmental health and safety professionals engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical applications that often require human judgment and interaction in various environments. While AI can assist with data analysis and reporting tasks, the core aspects of the job, such as ensuring safety standards and addressing public health concerns, still necessitate human presence and expertise.

title: Architects
education_req: A bachelor's degree from an accredited school of architecture or completion of the syllabus of studies from the Royal Architectural Institute of Canada (RAIC) is required.
A master's degree in architecture may be required.
Completion of a three-year internship under the supervision of a registered architect is required.
exposure_rationale: Architects primarily engage in knowledge work that involves design, planning, and project management, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While AI can assist in generating designs and optimizing plans, the need for human judgment, creativity, and client interaction remains significant, keeping the exposure to AI at a high but not maximum level.

title: Landscape architects
exposure_rationale: Landscape architects engage in a mix of design, planning, and project management, which involves both knowledge work and physical presence in outdoor environments. While AI can assist with design tools and data analysis, the occupation still heavily relies on human creativity, judgment, and interaction with clients and nature, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Urban and land use planners
education_req: A bachelor's degree in urban and regional planning, geography, architecture, engineering or a related discipline is required.
A master's degree in one of these disciplines may be required.
Membership in the Canadian Institute of Planners is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Urban and land use planners engage in a mix of knowledge work and interpersonal interactions, requiring both analytical skills and human judgment. While AI can assist in data analysis and modeling, the occupation still relies heavily on human insight and collaboration with stakeholders, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Land surveyors
education_req: A bachelor's degree in geomatics engineering or survey engineering is usually required.

A college diploma in survey science or geomatics technology with additional academic credits and successful completion of equivalent examinations set by a regional board of examiners for land surveyors is required.
A one- to three-year articling period is required.
exposure_rationale: Land surveyors primarily engage in physical work that requires on-site presence and manual skills, such as measuring land and analyzing geographical data. While AI can assist with data analysis and mapping, the core tasks still necessitate human judgment and physical presence, limiting overall exposure to AI.

title: Mathematicians, statisticians and actuaries
education_req: Mathematicians and statisticians usually require a graduate degree in mathematics or statistics.
Actuaries usually require post-secondary education in actuarial science, mathematics, statistics, economics, commerce or business administration.

Actuaries are conferred fellowships through the Canadian Institute of Actuaries upon successful completion of professional examinations and three years of work experience in the actuarial field as an actuarial assistant or in a related position.
exposure_rationale: Mathematicians, statisticians, and actuaries primarily engage in knowledge work that involves data analysis, modeling, and statistical reasoning, which are areas where AI is rapidly advancing. While human judgment and expertise are still crucial, AI tools can significantly enhance productivity and automate many analytical tasks, leading to a high level of exposure to AI-driven changes.

title: Data scientists
education_req: A bachelor's degree in statistics, mathematics, computer science, computer systems engineering or a related discipline or completion of a college program in computer science is usually required.
A master's or doctoral degree in machine learning, data science, or a related quantitative field is usually required.
Experience in programming is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Data scientists primarily work with digital data and employ advanced analytical techniques, making their core tasks highly susceptible to AI advancements. As AI tools continue to evolve, they can automate many data processing and analysis tasks, leading to significant restructuring in the occupation.

title: Cybersecurity specialists
education_req: A bachelor's degree in computer science, computer security, computer systems engineering, information systems or completion of a college program in information technology, network administration or other computer science related program is usually required.
Certification or training provided by software vendors may be required by some employers.
exposure_rationale: Cybersecurity specialists primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing and protecting digital systems, which is increasingly supported by AI tools. While human judgment and expertise are crucial in this field, the growing reliance on AI for threat detection and response indicates a significant potential for increased productivity and restructuring in the occupation.

title: Business systems specialists
education_req: A bachelor's degree in computer science, business administration, information systems or a related discipline or completion of a college program in computer science is usually required.
Certification or training provided by software vendors may be required by some employers.
exposure_rationale: Business systems specialists primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing and optimizing business processes, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and interpersonal skills are still crucial, the increasing reliance on digital systems and data analysis indicates a high potential for AI to reshape this occupation.

title: Information systems specialists
education_req: A bachelor's degree in computer science, computer systems engineering, software engineering, business administration or a related discipline or completion of a college program in computer science is usually required.
Experience as a computer programmer is usually required.

A professional certification such as Certified Information Systems Auditor (CISA), Certified Internal Auditor (CIA) or another related information technology (IT) designation may be required by some employers.
exposure_rationale: Information systems specialists primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analyzing and managing digital information systems. As AI technologies continue to advance, these specialists will likely see significant productivity gains from AI tools, although human judgment and oversight will still be essential in many aspects of their work.

title: Database analysts and data administrators
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college program, usually in computer science, computer engineering, or mathematics is usually required.
Computer programming and related experience is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Database analysts and data administrators primarily engage in knowledge work that involves data management and analysis, which are increasingly being enhanced by AI tools. While human judgment and expertise are still crucial, the rapid advancements in AI capabilities for data processing and analysis suggest a significant restructuring of the occupation in the near future.

title: Computer systems developers and programmers
education_req: A bachelor's degree or college diploma program in computer science, computer engineering or in another discipline with a significant programming component
Specialization in programming for engineering and scientific applications requires specific post-secondary study or experience.
exposure_rationale: Computer systems developers and programmers work primarily in digital environments, focusing on coding, software development, and system design. As AI technologies continue to advance, they are likely to automate many programming tasks, leading to significant restructuring within the occupation and increased productivity for those who leverage AI tools.

title: Software engineers and designers
education_req: A bachelor's degree, usually in computer science, computer systems engineering, software engineering or mathematics or completion of a college program in computer science is usually required.
A master's or doctoral degree in a related discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Software engineers and designers primarily engage in digital work involving coding, designing, and problem-solving, which are areas where AI is rapidly advancing. The nature of their tasks allows for significant automation and productivity enhancements through AI tools, indicating a very high exposure to AI-driven changes in the occupation.

title: Software developers and programmers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in computer science or software engineering or in another discipline with a significant programming component or completion of a college program in computer science or related field is usually required.
Progression to software engineer is possible with experience.
exposure_rationale: Software development is predominantly a digital occupation where core tasks such as coding, debugging, and system design are performed on computers. As AI technologies continue to advance rapidly in this field, the potential for automation and enhanced productivity is significant, leading to major restructuring in the role.

title: Web designers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in computer science or graphic design or completion or a college program in computer science, graphic arts, or Web design is required.
Experience as a graphic designer is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Web designers primarily work in a digital environment, focusing on tasks such as coding, designing, and analyzing user interfaces, which are all areas where AI is rapidly advancing. As AI tools become more capable of automating design processes and enhancing productivity, the occupation is likely to undergo significant restructuring, leading to a high level of exposure.

title: Web developers and programmers
education_req: A bachelor's degree, usually in computer science, computer programming, Web development or software engineering or completion of a college program in computer science or related field is usually required.
Experience as a computer programmer is usually required.
exposure_rationale: Web developers and programmers primarily engage in digital tasks that involve coding, designing, and analyzing software and websites. As AI technologies continue to advance rapidly in these areas, the potential for automation and productivity enhancement is significant, leading to a high level of exposure to AI-driven changes in the occupation.

title: Civil engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in civil engineering or in a related engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Civil engineering involves a mix of knowledge work and physical presence, as it requires both design and on-site project management. While AI can assist with design simulations and data analysis, the need for human judgment, creativity, and real-world interaction in construction and infrastructure projects limits the overall exposure to AI.

title: Mechanical engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in mechanical engineering or in a related engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Mechanical engineering involves a significant amount of knowledge work, including design, analysis, and problem-solving, which can be assisted by AI tools. However, the occupation also requires hands-on work, physical presence, and human judgment in various engineering tasks, limiting the extent to which AI can fully automate the role.

title: Electrical and electronics engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in electrical or electronics engineering or in an appropriate related engineering discipline is required.
A master's or doctoral degree in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Electrical and electronics engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application, often requiring human judgment and physical presence for design, testing, and implementation. While AI can assist in simulation, design optimization, and data analysis, the occupation still relies heavily on human expertise and interaction in complex engineering tasks.

title: Computer engineers (except software engineers and designers)
education_req: Computer engineers require a bachelor's degree in computer engineering, electrical or electronics engineering, engineering physics or computer science.
A master's or doctoral degree in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Computer engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application, often requiring human judgment and problem-solving skills. While AI can assist with design and analysis tasks, the need for human oversight and the physical aspects of engineering projects limit the overall exposure to AI.

title: Chemical engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in chemical engineering or in a related engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Chemical engineering involves a mix of knowledge work and practical application in physical environments, such as laboratories and manufacturing facilities. While AI can assist with data analysis and simulation tasks, the core responsibilities often require human judgment, creativity, and hands-on problem-solving that are not easily automated.

title: Industrial and manufacturing engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in industrial engineering or in a related engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Industrial and manufacturing engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application in physical environments. While AI can assist in design, optimization, and data analysis, many aspects of their work still require human judgment, creativity, and physical presence in manufacturing settings.

title: Metallurgical and materials engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in metallurgical, materials, ceramic or chemical engineering or in a related engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Metallurgical and materials engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and hands-on tasks, often requiring physical presence in labs or manufacturing environments. While AI can assist in data analysis and simulation, the core aspects of their work involve human judgment and physical processes that are not easily automated.

title: Mining engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in mining engineering or in a related engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Mining engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and hands-on tasks that require physical presence in mining environments. While AI can assist with data analysis and project planning, the core aspects of their work involve real-world applications and human judgment, limiting the potential for full automation.

title: Geological engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in geological engineering or in a related discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Geological engineers primarily engage in knowledge work that involves analysis and problem-solving related to natural resources, which can be supported by AI tools. However, the job also requires fieldwork and physical presence for site assessments, limiting the overall exposure to AI automation.

title: Petroleum engineers
exposure_rationale: Petroleum engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application in the field, requiring both technical expertise and physical presence for site assessments and operations. While AI can assist with data analysis and modeling, the core tasks still rely heavily on human judgment and interaction with physical systems.

title: Aerospace engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in aerospace engineering or in a related engineering discipline, such as mechanical engineering or engineering physics, is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Aerospace engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application, requiring both technical expertise and human judgment. While AI can assist in design simulations and data analysis, the occupation still relies heavily on human creativity and problem-solving in complex engineering tasks, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Other professional engineers
education_req: A bachelor's degree in an appropriate engineering discipline is required.
A master's degree or doctorate in a related engineering discipline may be required.
Licensing by a provincial or territorial association of professional engineers is required to approve engineering drawings and reports, and to practise as a Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).
exposure_rationale: Other professional engineers engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical application, often requiring human judgment and creativity. While AI can assist in data analysis and design processes, many aspects of engineering still necessitate human oversight, collaboration, and physical presence in project execution.

title: Chemical technologists and technicians
education_req: Chemical technologists usually require completion of a two- or three-year college program in chemical, biochemical or chemical engineering technology or a closely related discipline.
Chemical technicians usually require completion of a one- or two-year college program in chemical, biochemical or chemical engineering technology.
National certification for chemical technologists and technicians is available through the Canadian Society for Chemical Technology.
exposure_rationale: Chemical technologists and technicians engage in a mix of knowledge work and practical laboratory tasks, which require human judgment and physical presence. While AI can assist with data analysis and some routine tasks, the core responsibilities still rely heavily on human expertise and hands-on work in laboratory settings.

title: Geological and mineral technologists and technicians
education_req: Geological and mineral technologists usually require completion of a two- to three-year college program in geological technology, petroleum technology, petroleum engineering technology, hydrogeology or groundwater technology, mining technology, mining engineering technology, mineralogy, metallurgical technology, or welding technology.
Geophysics technologists usually require completion of a two- to three-year college program in electronics technology.
Geological and mineral technicians usually require completion of a one- to two-year college program in a related field.
exposure_rationale: Geological and mineral technologists and technicians engage in a mix of knowledge work and fieldwork, requiring both technical skills and physical presence in various environments. While AI can assist with data analysis and modeling, the job still relies heavily on human judgment and real-world interactions, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Biological technologists and technicians
education_req: Completion of a two- to three-year college program in a field related to agriculture, biology, microbiology, wildlife or resource management is usually required for employment as a biological technologist.
Completion of a one- to two-year college program in a related field is required for employment as a biological technician.
Certification with provincial associations is available, but voluntary.
exposure_rationale: Biological technologists and technicians engage in a mix of laboratory work and technical tasks that require both knowledge and hands-on skills. While AI can assist with data analysis and some routine laboratory tasks, the occupation still relies heavily on human judgment and physical presence in lab settings, limiting its overall exposure to AI.

title: Agricultural and fish products inspectors
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.
Government inspectors usually require a bachelor's degree or college diploma in agriculture, biology, chemistry, food processing technology or a related discipline.
Inspectors (other than government) may require a bachelor's degree or college diploma in a related discipline.
exposure_rationale: Agricultural and fish products inspectors primarily engage in physical inspections and assessments of products, which require human presence and judgment in unpredictable environments.
