While AI may assist with data analysis and reporting, the core tasks of this occupation remain largely hands-on and interpersonal, limiting overall exposure to AI.

title: Forestry technologists and technicians
education_req: Completion of a one- to three-year college program in forestry technology or in a renewable resource program or forest ranger program is usually required.
Registration with a regulatory body is required for forestry technologists or technicians in all provinces except Prince Edward Island and Manitoba.
Certification or licensing as a scaler is required for some positions.
exposure_rationale: Forestry technologists and technicians engage in a mix of fieldwork and technical analysis, which requires physical presence and hands-on skills in natural environments. While AI can assist with data analysis and some technical tasks, the core responsibilities still rely heavily on human judgment and interaction with the physical world.

title: Conservation and fishery officers
exposure_rationale: Conservation and fishery officers primarily engage in fieldwork that involves monitoring and managing natural resources, which requires physical presence and hands-on interaction with the environment. While AI may assist with data analysis and reporting tasks, the core responsibilities of this occupation are not easily automated and rely heavily on human judgment and real-time decision-making in unpredictable settings.

title: Landscape and horticulture technicians and specialists
education_req: Completion of a two-to-three year college program in agronomy, arboriculture, horticulture, landscaping, landscape design or landscape technology is usually required.
Experience as a landscape and grounds maintenance labourer may be required for golf course superintendents, landscape gardeners and landscapers.
An apprenticeship program is available for horticulturists, arboriculturists and landscape gardeners.
exposure_rationale: Landscape and horticulture technicians and specialists primarily engage in physical and hands-on work related to plants and landscapes, which requires real-time human presence and interaction with the environment. While AI may assist with data analysis or planning tasks, the core responsibilities of this occupation are not easily automated or digitized.

title: Architectural technologists and technicians
education_req: Completion of a two- to three-year college program in architectural technology or a related subject is usually required.

Certification in architectural technology or in a related field through provincial associations of architectural or engineering/applied science technologists and technicians may be required by employers.
A period of supervised work experience, usually two years, is required before certification.
exposure_rationale: Architectural technologists and technicians primarily engage in knowledge work that involves design, analysis, and technical documentation, which can be enhanced by AI tools. While their work requires human judgment and collaboration with clients and other professionals, AI can significantly improve productivity in tasks such as drafting, modeling, and project management.

title: Industrial designers
education_req: A university degree in industrial design, architecture, engineering or a college diploma in industrial design is required.
Creative ability, as demonstrated by a portfolio of work, is required.
exposure_rationale: Industrial designers engage in a mix of creative and technical tasks, often requiring human judgment and physical prototyping. While AI can assist in design processes and enhance productivity, the need for human creativity and interaction in the design phase limits the extent of automation.

title: Drafting technologists and technicians
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a two- to three-year college program in engineering design and drafting technology or in a related field is usually required for drafting and design technologists.

Completion of a one- to two-year college program in drafting or completion of a three- to four-year apprenticeship program or four to five years of related experience plus completion of college or industry courses in drafting are usually required for drafting technicians.
exposure_rationale: Drafting technologists and technicians primarily engage in knowledge work that involves creating and modifying technical drawings and plans, which can be significantly enhanced by AI tools. While there is a need for human judgment and creativity in design, AI can automate many routine aspects of drafting, leading to increased productivity and potential restructuring of the occupation.

title: Land survey technologists and technicians
education_req: Completion of secondary school is usually required.
Completion of a two- to three-year college program in geomatics or land survey technology is usually required for land survey technologists.
Completion of a one- to two-year college program in geomatics or land survey technology is usually required for land survey technicians.
exposure_rationale: Land survey technologists and technicians engage in a mix of technical knowledge work and fieldwork that requires physical presence. While AI can assist with data analysis and mapping tasks, the core of the job still relies on human judgment and physical surveying in various environments.

title: Technical occupations in geomatics and meteorology
education_req: Completion of secondary school is required.

Geomatics technologists and technicians require completion of a college program in geomatics, cartography, photogrammetry, aerial survey, remote sensing, geographic information system (GIS) or geomatics.
In Quebec, membership in the regulatory body for professional technologists is required to use the title ''Professional Technologist''.
exposure_rationale: Technical occupations in geomatics and meteorology involve a mix of knowledge work and physical presence, particularly in data collection and analysis. While AI can assist in data processing and analysis, many tasks still require human judgment and interaction with the physical environment, leading to moderate exposure to AI.

title: Computer network and web technicians
education_req: Completion of a college or other program in computer science, network administration, Web technology or a related field is usually required.
Certification or training provided by software vendors may be required by some employers.
Registration with a regulatory body is required in Saskatchewan.
exposure_rationale: Computer network and web technicians primarily engage in knowledge work that involves troubleshooting, configuring, and maintaining computer networks and web systems.
